message:
test(franken_decision): comprehensive unit + proptest suite (bd-3l1u4)

63 unit tests + 1 doc-test covering all franken_decision types:

- Argmin correctness: deterministic posteriors, breakeven analysis,
  3x3 state/action matrix verification
- Bayesian update: hand-computed 3-state example, successive convergence
  over 20 observations
- FallbackPolicy: all three trigger conditions, exact thresholds, serde
- End-to-end pipeline: observations -> posterior shift -> decision -> ledger
- Concurrent safety: 10 threads making simultaneous decisions
- Cross-crate type verification: franken_kernel DecisionId/TraceId
- proptest (10k cases each): bayes_action minimizes expected loss (2x2, 3x3),
  bayesian_update preserves normalization, posterior non-negativity,
  expected_loss within column range, serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 [dev-dependencies]
 serde_json = "1.0"
 toml = "0.8"
+proptest = "1.6"
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "deny"
